task.title: Implement feedback build workflow and writer
task.summary: TASK-049: Feedback build writer implemented with lifecycle metadata and smoke coverage.

goal.outcome: Agents can run the feedback loop and produce a durable but transient accepted feedback_build through CodeWiki tooling or documented command flow.
acceptance: A feedback build schema or typed contract exists
Feedback_build artifacts include lifecycle state and TTL/cleanup metadata
A writer path/tool/command creates feedback_build artifacts under .codewiki/builds/feedback/
The codewiki skill explains the feedback loop execution path without manual JSON hand-editing
Smoke coverage proves feedback_build creation works in a temp repo
Feedback loop failure mode from this session is covered by a regression or documented guard
non_goals: Implement the full reconciliation state machine
verification: Manual run or smoke fixture creates a feedback_build artifact with lifecycle metadata

delta.desired: Feedback loop is executable and durable enough for handoff, but builds remain transient lifecycle-managed artifacts.
delta.current: Feedback compiler is documented, but no first-class writer path exists; assistant attempted to emit a tool call into chat and no artifact was created until manual correction.
delta.closure: Add schema/writer/workflow docs/tests so feedback_build creation is reliable and lifecycle-aware.
